title: 6 Pack Place Mats for Table – Durable and Easy to Clean Placemats for Dining, Kitchen, or Home Decor – Non-Slip, Heat-resistant, Stylish Table Mats (Grey)
features: Premium Durable Material – Crafted from 70% PVC and 30% Polyester, these placemats are sturdy, flexible, and built to last. The high-quality blend ensures resistance to daily wear, making them ideal for family meals, dinner parties, or everyday table protection.

Effortless Cleaning & Washable – Designed for convenience, the placemats can be quickly wiped clean with a damp cloth or rinsed under running water. They dry fast, resist stubborn stains, and save you time on after-meal clean-up, keeping your dining area fresh and tidy.

Heat Resistant up to 80°C – Protect your dining table from heat marks, spills, and scratches. With a resistance up to 80°C, these mats handle hot plates, bowls, and mugs with ease, ensuring your table remains safe and stylish.

Non-Slip & Wrinkle-Free Design – The textured surface keeps plates, glasses, and cutlery firmly in place, reducing accidental slips. Unlike fabric mats, they resist wrinkling and folding, always lying flat for a neat, professional look on your table.

Fade-Resistant & Perfect Size – Measuring 30 x 45 cm, these placemats fit most dining tables and settings. The colours stay vibrant even after long-term use, adding a touch of elegance to your kitchen, dining room, or outdoor space without fading or losing shape.
description: Product Description 6 Pack Placemat Set: Elevate Every Meal with Style & Practicality Perfect Size for Everyday Dining: Each placemat measures 45 x 30 cm, offering ample space for plates, cutlery, and glasses. Designed to define personal dining areas neatly, it brings instant order and elegance to your table—whether for a quick breakfast or a relaxed family dinner. Effortless Table Styling: With soft colors and subtle textures, these placemats effortlessly enhance your table setting. They help create a warm, inviting atmosphere—turning ordinary meals into special moments, day after day. Convenience for Daily Use: A set of six placemats meets all your daily and entertaining needs. Lightweight and easy to clean—just wipe and go—they make beautiful table settings an effortless part of your routine. Reliable Table Protection: Shield your table from heat, spills, and stains with confidence. Whether it’s a hot mug or an accidental splash, these placemats keep your surface looking new while you enjoy fincy dining. Versatile for Any Occasion: Ideal for family meals, brunch with friends, or festive gatherings, these placemats adapt to any scene. They complement both casual and formal tableware, helping you maintain a touch of elegance wherever you dine. Simple Upgrade, Lasting Elegance: The 6 Piece Placemat Collection High-quality Placemats Elegant Table Accent – Designed with a refined colour palette and woven texture, these placemats instantly elevate the look of your dining table, blending seamlessly with both modern and classic décor. Perfect for Any Occasion – Ideal for daily family meals, weekend brunches, or festive gatherings, they create a welcoming atmosphere that makes every dining experience more enjoyable. Easy to Clean The placemats can be quickly wiped clean with a damp cloth or rinsed under running water. Measuring 30 x 45 cm, these placemats fit most dining tables and settings. The colours stay vibrant even after long-term use, adding a touch of elegance to your kitchen, dining room, or outdoor space without fading or losing shape. Made of 70% PVC + 30% Polyester Designed to be heat-resistant, non-slip, and easy to clean, they offer practical protection for your table while enhancing its style. Whether you’re hosting family dinners, casual breakfasts, or festive occasions, these placemats transform your table into a welcoming space filled with warmth and charm. Different Colors of Table Mats Pack of 6 - Perfect for Family Use
